feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Batch Inbound Integration - Use of element ChangeOrdinalNumberValue
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to use SOAP API Batch Inbound Integration for connecting a third party WMS:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/9ce855c709ce4f5c99b685903461106e/d51b13a65cc744cf97a28a19e617d9dd.html?version=2408.500
https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_BATCHBULKRPLCTNINFORMATION-v1/overview

for creating new batches and updating existing batches.
Not clear to us is the use of element ChangeOrdinalNumberValue. We noticed that setting a value for this field is required since SAP otherwise rejects/ignores this request (see screenshot).
Therefore we set ChangeOrdinalNumberValue to 1, as result the batch were created. For updating this batch we would need to set a greater ChangeOrdinalNumberValue.
Our first idea was to read the current ChangeOrdinalNumberValue via Batch Master Record ODATA API (similar to the eTag handling concept) but this API doesn't provide the ChangeOrdinalNumberValue in its response.

https://api.sap.com/api/API_BATCH_SRV/overview


Our current idea is to convert the current date/ date of the request to a unix timestamp and use this as ChangeOrdinalNumberValue so that newer requests have always a greater ChangeOrdinalNumberValue.

Questions is what is best practices of this ChangeOrdinalNumberValue handling when connecting a third party WMS? We don't want to force the WMS to store all ChangeOrdinalNumberValue in its system and looking for a automated solution.

We definitely want to use the SOAP API to have monitoring in AIF.

Thanks and best regards

Robert

entry.title: No Authorization to post inventory differences
entry.content:
I receive this error, when I try to post Inventory differences.

"You cannot post the inventory difference for this item.
Terminate this processing mode and choose Inventory Count -> Enter to enter the count results without difference posting.
To post the difference for this item, contact a person who is authorized to post higher inventory differences.
Message no. MM_IMRAP_PI053"

 



I am Authorized to all, as far as I can see.

What could be the reason?

Best Regards
Manuel

entry.title: API's for workforce management in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Team,


We are doing an automated sync from SuccessFactors to S4HANA for the workforce creation. Just wanted to check if we have APIs available from S4HANA workforce management as we need to implement some use cases for the IAM integration part?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: "Edit" button not available in FIORI App "Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting-Specific"
entry.content: Edit button is disabled in "Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting" app

entry.title: How to mass delete physical inventory documents on sap public cloud
entry.content:
There have been more than 1500 physical inventory documents created by mistake. We need a solution to delete them on public cloud.

As of now, could find jus one option which is to delete individually.

Need a solution by which can delete in mass.

entry.title: CDS view for Decision Text mentioned in the My Inbox while releasing the Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

 

Could you please inform us the CDS view for the string field Decision Text that appears when a Sales Order is being released in the My Inbox app?

 

Best regards,

Customer


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Restricting applications and removing buttons
entry.content:
Hello,
I would like to inform you that the client is in PRD, and requires within its processes to apply restrictions to certain applications and functionalities within them.
-It is required that the Reiniciliation of compensated items app be added to a certain number of business users per area.
-In addition, it is required to restrict functionalities within some apps. In the "Reiniciliation of compensated items" app, they want to remove the "Reiniciliation" button for a certain number of business users.
Please provide your support to find out if this function is possible within the public version of the cloud. This option is important for the client.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Intercompany sales process possible between S/4 HANA on prem and S/4 HANA Cloud, public edition?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to clarify, if the usage of the Intercompany sales process between S/4 HANA on prem system and S/4 HANA Cloud, public edition is possible. The on premise system is located in Germany, the Cloud-System is hosted in the US. The cloud system belongs to the US subsidiary. The headquarter is based in Germany and uses the on premise system. Both companies have different company codes as they are currently processed in two systems.

To make things easier between both parties, the Intercompany sales process is one idea. Would it work or do you have any better solutions?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: S4 Public Edition - Incorrect Public Sector Activation in CBC
entry.content:
Hi,

In the customer system, we by mistake activated the evaluation project in CBC system as "Public Sector". The solution is now activated. We want to revert this and re-active as Private. What is the process for this?

entry.title: Validation of UK VAT ID in SAP
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

 

We need your assistance in understanding the SAP source link/portal which is used to check if a particular UK VAT ID is valid or invalid.

Kindly help us understand how the validation for UK VAT IDs is performed in the SAP system.

 

Thanks in advance!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SD_BILL_DATA_TRANSFER Badi Implementation is not working
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am have implemented the following badi "SD_BILL_DATA_TRANSFER" in order to convert the quantity of material/line item from TON to KG . I have tried passing the data into custom field which I have created to show the quantity conversion value but the issue is the converted value is not visible when I test or check in "display billing documents " or "change billing documents" app in sap public cloud.

Please suggest me a solution so that I can fulfill the requirement . I have used the following code to convert the value from ton to KG, I have used "907.185" value for conversion. My code is working in test mode but its not showing data at actual app. Your feedback would be highly valuable. 

Also, please suggest if I am using correct Badi or do I have to use another one to achieve the requirement ?

thanks,

Rajvardhan Patil

entry.title: Product Compliance - SVT - affected applications versus exempted applications
entry.content:
Hello Michael and Sylvia, hi guys,
at level of my product I assign the related application of my (unpacked) product. So far so good.
A Compliance Requirement related to Substance Volume Tracking - e.g., EU REACH Registration Status, there are both "Affected Applications" and "Exempted Applications" available...

Question in brief: is the data element "Affected Application" considered anywhere in the solution?

Assumption: any Packaged Products that belong to an Unpackaged Product that does have at least one exempted application listed for a SVT relevant Compliance Requirement is not considered at all for (this CR) SVT calculation.
Question regular: so for what reason is the data point "Affected Application" required? So from understanding, others applications than "Industrial Chemicals" as, e.g., cosmetic, detergent, etc. are relevant for SVT Compliance Requirement EU REACH Registration Status, too. Aren't they?

Thanks
Harry

entry.title: How to find configuration Definition of Clearing Rules?
entry.content:
Where to find configuration Definition of Clearing Rules?

entry.title: Scope Item 6W1 - Freight Unit Building Rule available
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new to SAP TM Public Cloud. I have a question related to the Freight Unit Building Rule App. Is the Freight Unit Building Rule App also available for scope item 6W1 External Transportation Planning ? I checked the App catalogue but I couldn't find any information.

entry.title: App "Manage Prices - Sales" - created by user and changed by user information
entry.content:
Hi all,

is there a possibility to add the "created by" and "changed by" as a filter or in the table of results in the FIORI App "Manage Prices - Sales"? 

For our customer, this is a crucial information for condition records. 

In the GUI-App "Set material prices - Sales" there is a change log for that information so it should be available somehow.

Thanks and best regards

Katja

entry.title: gCTS in S/4HANA Cloud 2502: “Could Not Verify Content” / “Registered Commits couldn’t be read” Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m in a multi-off delivery scenario, where I develop ABAP custom code in an SAP S/4HANA Cloud 1-system environment (the source) and then deploy it to an SAP S/4HANA Cloud 3-system environment (the target) using Git-Enabled CTS (gCTS). Concretely, I push commits from the 1-system landscape to a remote Git repository, and then attempt to pull those commits into the 3-system landscape (DEV → TEST → PROD).

Since the S/4HANA Cloud Public 2502 upgrade in our 3-system TEST environment, I can no longer import new commits from my remote Git repositories using Git-Enabled CTS (gCTS). Each time I try to pull a commit, I see:

Could not verify content
The repository was not imported because the content could not be verified. Please contact the repository owner.

And in the technical details:

Error action COMMIT_VERIFICATION Code 411x011: Registered Commits couldn’t be read.

In the gCTS logs (the ones viewable in the gCTS Fiori application), I mostly get “Error when importing commit” without much else. However, looking deeper into the Eclipse ADT Feed, Gateway error logs (OData service SCTS_GCTS_SRV) reveals more specific messages, such as:

{... ,"section": "REPOSITORY", "action": "PULL_BY_COMMIT", "severity": "ERROR", "message": "BAdI 'scts_gcts_enh_deploy' raised exception for 'check_before_import' "}

{"severity":"ERROR", "message": "Error when importing commit.", "code": "GCTS.API.411"}

It seems the COMMIT_VERIFICATION step fails before the import actually begins. This problem started immediately after the 2502 upgrade — previously we had no issues pulling from the same Git repository.

Has anyone seen this error in a multi-off delivery scenario?

  • Is there a new verification check in 2502 that might fail if certain commit data, authorizations, or repository settings aren’t in place?
  • Could the BAdI scts_gcts_enh_deploy be blocking the import for some reason in check_before_import?
  • Are there SAP Notes/KBAs covering a similar error in COMMIT_VERIFICATION with “GCTS.API.411” or “Registered Commits couldn’t be read”?

Environment/Versions

  • Source: S/4HANA Cloud Public 1-System (Partner Demo) – version 2408
  • Target: S/4HANA Cloud Public 3-System (DEV → TEST → PROD) – currently failing in TEST version 2502
  • gCTS for multi-off delivery with a GitHub remote repository
  • S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition version 2502

I would appreciate any pointers or workarounds for getting multi-off delivery working again in 2502.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Define Work Center Category Does Not Exist
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement to link between Work Center Category and Work Center Usage, for example if we choose the category "Plant Maintenance" then the usage will be default to "Only Maintenance Task List".

Is it possible on the standard feature? We read some articles that say use the "Define Work Center Category" but we cannot find the app or find the menu on "Implementation Activities.

Any Suggestion?

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management

entry.title: Incoterm Location 1 - Can it remain empty in BP masterdata and sales order?
entry.content:
Hi all,

there are some questions regarding the incoterms and the error handling. 

When the incoterms ID (like "EXW") are maintained in the BP master data, there is an error occurring which tells me to fill the incoterms location. In customizing, there is no way to change this error handling. Also for sales orders - in the incompleteness procedure I can only set the incoterm ID, but not especially the field "incoterms location". 

Is there any chance that the incoterms ID can be used without the field "incoterms location"? 

Thanks and best regards

Katja

entry.title: SEND NOTIFICATIOS/ ALERTS BETWEEN USERS IN S4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC
entry.content:
Hello,

I as a SAP user (A) want to send messages in notification or alert mode to another SAP user (B), is there any way to do it?

In SAP R3, for example, we can send message type pop-up. It would be something similar.

Is there such an option?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Ismael.

entry.title: Check used capacity of every custom field
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

firstly, I would like to ask about the capacity that particular custom field use. I know, that business context has certain capacity and that by creating a custom field in it, it will consume some capacity, but I would like to know the exact percentage of the capacity that every custom field takes.
Is it possible to check it somewhere? In the app Extensibility cockpit I can see only the percentage of used capacity, but that is it, and it is not enough for us. 

My second question is about lowering the number of characters of custom field. 
From my experience it is not possible, as there will be error message saying that I cannot decrease the value. BUT, is there any other way how to do it instead of deleting the field and creating the new one? From my understanding deleting the field that is already used will also delete data inside, which can be dangerous in production. 

Thank you very much for your help. 
Veronika
